V-M-069.scope: Verify favicon/PWA/email-logo public assets, browser HTML references, Resend email template logo rendering, documentation, and protected deployment boundaries.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py -v

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/current-status.xml docs/plans/Phase-51.xml docs/modules/M-069.xml docs/verification/V-M-069.xml

assertions.assertion-1: frontend/public and frontend-admin/public contain valid favicon.ico plus 16x16/32x32 PNG fallbacks.
assertions.assertion-2: frontend/public contains apple-touch-icon.png 180x180, pwa-192x192.png 192x192, pwa-512x512.png 512x512, and brand/email-logo.png 256x256.
assertions.assertion-3: frontend and admin index.html reference real favicon assets instead of missing favicon.svg.
assertions.assertion-4: Email HTML renders {FRONTEND_URL}/brand/email-logo.png with KrotPN alt text; text fallback does not include the logo URL.
assertions.assertion-5: README explains that the email body logo is distinct from BIMI sender-avatar display.
assertions.assertion-6: install.sh, deploy, docker-compose, nginx edge topology, VPN runtime, and MTProto runtime have no Phase-51 diff.

forbidden.item: Changing deploy/install scripts or runtime topology.
Adding visible frontend/admin logo layout before the planned frontend redesign phase.
Logging verification/reset tokens or provider secrets.
Claiming Resend can force mailbox sender avatars.

evidence.evidence-1: node scripts/phase51-brand-assets-smoke.mjs passed for source asset signatures/dimensions, frontend/admin HTML links, Vite PWA asset names, email template binding, README notes, and protected deploy/install diff guard.
evidence.evidence-2: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py -v passed 5/5.
evidence.evidence-3: cd frontend && npm run build passed; cd frontend-admin && npm run build passed.
evidence.evidence-4: node scripts/phase51-brand-assets-smoke.mjs --expect-dist passed and confirmed Vite copied favicon/PWA/email-logo assets into production dist.
evidence.evidence-5: XML parse, mygrace lint, and git diff --check passed.
